description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The exterior features a mix of large glass sliding doors and smaller rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house is surrounded by a green lawn, with outdoor seating and a grill area visible in the backyard. The front includes a driveway leading to an attached garage, and the main entrance is marked by double doors. The color scheme alternates between stark black and white facades, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with glass and metal accents.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of black and white exterior walls, featuring a garage and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with a visible garage, main entrance, and a portion of the backyard with outdoor furniture and a grill.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible here, highlighting the double-door entryway, garage, and a clean, white exterior with several windows.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the house are shown, with multiple windows, the garage, and a large expanse of green lawn.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the backyard, featuring large glass sliding doors, outdoor seating, and a black exterior wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large sliding glass doors and scattered rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door main entry with a paved walkway, no porch or overhang, and a minimalist, clean-lined appearance
